test-generator.description: Generate pytest/Jest/Go unit tests with fixtures, mocks, parametrize, and coverage reports

doc-generator.author: OpenClaw Community
doc-generator.description: Auto-generate API docs, READMEs, docstrings (Python/TSDoc/JSDoc), and Mermaid architecture diagrams

session-tools.author: OpenClaw Community

plugin-marketplace.author: OpenClaw Community

ide-panel.description: Soft-IDE — code panel with file tree exploration, LSP intelligence bridge, and quick-action shortcuts for review/test/docs
